selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 36 follow-up repairs against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, S-101/OpenCPN provider witnesses, Chart No.1 parity crops where available, actual batch-36 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch, and TIDCUR02 actual-current comparator evidence for TIDCUR01.

verdicts.observed: Candidate is a grey stepped/angular sand-wave glyph: a short horizontal run with repeated sharp wavelets, no brown colour, and no large smooth swell curve.
verdicts.expected: SNDWAV02 must be the grey repeating sand-wave reference pattern: short angular/stepped wavelets at reference scale, not a generic swell or smooth wave icon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct SNDWAV sand-wave class, grey CHGRD/ACHGRD colour family, angular/stepped wavelet pattern, and no dangerous substitution with generic swell artwork. The Helm candidate is bolder/larger than the tiny OpenCPN raster oracle, but its load-bearing geometry now matches the S-101/OpenCPN witness class closely enough for judge pass pending final approval. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:SNDWAV line/point; LS(DASH,2,CHGRD);SY(SNDWAV02); OpenCPN definition SNDWAV02, colour ref ACHGRD.

verdicts.observed: Candidate is an orange upward current-direction stack with separated chevrons and a broken/dashed center shaft/tail; it has no upper-right TIDCUR02 dot and is visibly distinct from the solid TIDCUR02 actual-current arrow.
verdicts.expected: TIDCUR01 is predicted tidal stream/current direction: an orange dashed/discrete arrow stack with separated chevrons and broken shaft/tail, visually distinct from the solid TIDCUR02 actual-current arrow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct predicted-current class, orange NINFO/ANINFO colour family, upward directional orientation, discrete shaft/tail segmentation, and no TIDCUR02 dot. The larger Helm styling remains acceptable because the predicted-vs-actual distinction is now preserved; no final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:tidcur point / $CSYMB; SY(TIDCUR01,ORIENT); often paired with SY(TIDCUR03) and TX('P',...); OpenCPN definition TIDCUR01, colour ref ANINFO.
